title.install: Install {count, plural, one {# model} other {# models}} to run this query

preflight.pinnedHint: Install this specific version from the model card's previous-versions list.
preflight.unknownPinHint: The catalog has no version matching this pin. Pin to an available version or remove the @… suffix.
